promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not treat this reduction as active runtime authority, as proof that the deep-archive root has been semantically read in full, or as permission to promote current-state residue, packaging noise, registry stop reasons, or milestone zip presence into active A2 law from this batch alone.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the cache-export child completed the smaller export-lineage bridge and the live-ledger next step now returns to the deferred deep-archive root parent.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent already isolates the needed bounded seam: the deep-archive root is a topology and retention-class map, not a semantic read of 7805 files, with the main structural lesson being three top-level milestone zips versus one much larger migrated run-root subtree plus a compact registry index.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The cache-export child was used to preserve lane ordering and keep this root descent below the smaller export bridge, the closure audit was used to preserve live-ledger priority over stale folder-order shortcuts, and the migrated-run-root first-pass family was used to keep the root child aimed at registry-driven handoff rather than premature descendant-run selection.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because the root topology and registry-seam child should be made explicit before deeper migrated-run-root reduction becomes the next step.
Deferred because descendant run-family targeting should follow the migrated-run-root registry handoff rather than skipping directly past the root and subtree selection logic.
Deferred because that bridge already has a bounded A2-mid child and now serves as comparison support rather than the primary next parent.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent first-pass source map, distillates, tensions, and candidate summaries already isolate the root-topology, milestone-zip ladder, migrated-run-root dominance, registry-index, and current-state-residue seam. A later pass can reopen the underlying zips or migrated run subtree if exact run-family details are needed.

candidate_items.name: DEEP_ARCHIVE_ROOT_IS_RETENTION_TOPOLOGY_MAP_NOT_DOCTRINAL_CONTENT_READ
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest source-class rule in the parent: this batch is a root topology map for the deep-archive milestone family rather than a doctrinal read of milestone contents.

candidate_items.name: MIGRATED_RUN_ROOT_DOMINATES_FAMILY_MASS_AND_OUTRANKS_TOPLEVEL_ZIP_VISUAL_PROMINENCE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the main structural lesson that almost all archival mass sits in the migrated run-root subtree rather than in the visually prominent top-level milestone zips.

candidate_items.name: MILESTONE_ZIP_LADDER_PRESERVES_SHARED_SYSTEMV3_SKELETON_WITH_SIZE_AND_HYGIENE_DRIFT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the useful but limited zip-ladder lesson: the three top-level milestone zips share a recognizable `system_v3` skeleton while differing sharply in size and still retaining packaging noise.

candidate_items.name: RUNS_REGISTRY_IS_THE_SMALLEST_HIGH_SIGNAL_DESCENT_INDEX_NOT_A_SUBSTITUTE_FOR_RUN_CORPUS
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the compact registry as the best bounded intake foothold into the migrated subtree while blocking registry-only overread of the much larger unread run corpus.

candidate_items.name: RUN_HISTORY_AND_CURRENT_STATE_RESIDUE_MUST_REMAIN_SEPARATE_RETENTION_MODES
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the structural split between thousands of historical run files and a much smaller current-state residue branch rather than collapsing both into one state concept.

candidate_items.name: ROOT_DESCENT_SHOULD_HAND_OFF_TO_MIGRATED_RUN_ROOT_REGISTRY_BEFORE_DESCENDANT_RUN_SELECTION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the best next-step rule after this root child: the lane should move into the migrated-run-root registry family before selecting any specific descendant run family such as `RUN_FOUNDATION_BATCH_0001`.

quarantined_items.name: CURRENT_STATE_RESIDUE_UNDER_DEEP_ARCHIVE_AS_ACTIVE_RUNTIME_STATE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly preserves current-state residue as historical retention, not active runtime truth.

quarantined_items.name: MILESTONE_ZIP_PACKAGING_NOISE_AS_MEANINGFUL_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Packaging noise such as `__MACOSX` and `.DS_Store` is retained archive residue, not doctrine.

quarantined_items.name: RUN_REGISTRY_STOP_REASONS_AS_FULL_EXPLANATION_OF_THE_RUN_CORPUS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The 27-line registry is useful as an index but cannot substitute for deeper reads of the much larger migrated run corpus.

quarantined_items.name: TOP_LEVEL_MILESTONE_ZIPS_AS_THE_WHOLE_DEEP_ARCHIVE_STORY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The top-level zips are visually prominent but do not represent where most of the archived mass actually sits.

quarantined_items.name: LOW_ENTROPY_MILESTONE_LABEL_AS_PROOF_OF_SMALL_SCALE_OR_CLEAN_HYGIENE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The family is large, mixed, and still preserves packaging noise despite the milestone label.

quarantined_items.name: DIRECT_DESCENDANT_RUN_SELECTION_BEFORE_MIGRATED_ROOT_HANDOFF
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The root child should hand off first to the migrated-run-root registry family rather than jumping directly to a descendant run packet from the root.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the cleanest reusable packets in the parent: root-topology demotion, migrated-run-root mass dominance, milestone zip ladder continuity below hygiene drift, registry-as-index, history-versus-residue separation, and a clean handoff into migrated-run-root descent.
They remain archive-linked, contradiction-preserving, and explicitly below active runtime, milestone, and descendant-run authority.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain runtime overread, packaging-noise overread, registry-summary overread, top-level zip overread, milestone-label overread, or premature descendant-run selection rather than clean A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them explicitly, but not to promote them into active law.
